title: Inverse Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by flash loan and collateralization on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle price and then uses flash loan to borrow large amounts

red_flags: Manipulating oracle price to inflate token value
Using flash loan to borrow large amounts
monitoring_rules: BLOCK MANIPULATE_ORACLE_PRICE -> FLASH_LOAN_BORROW in single tx
summary: The attacker manipulated the Inverse Finance oracle price to inflate the value of INV token and then used a flash loan to borrow $15.6M. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for oracle manipulation followed by flash loan activity.
